'''Agridorn''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Agridorn system/Legends|Agridorn system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region. During the latter days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Agridorn was represented in the Senate by [[Rhya Taloon]], who pledge her world's support to the Republic at the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. When the Republic was transformed into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Senator Taloon fled into the depth of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to avoid assassination. Despite her efforts she was discovered to be a member of [[Erased|the Erased]] and was executed by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' {{1stm}}
